inputs.label: Joint Length
inputs.businessContext: The linear length of one joint to be filled with mastic.

businessContext_i18n.en: The linear length of one joint to be filled with mastic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mastik ile doldurulacak bir derzin doğrusal uzunluğu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die lineare Länge einer zu füllenden Fuge.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur linéaire d'un joint à remplir de mastic.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud lineal de una junta a rellenar con masilla.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول الخطي لمفصل واحد ليتم ملؤه بالمادة المانعة للتسرب.

inputs.label: Joint Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of the joint gap.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of the joint gap.

inputs.label: Joint Depth
inputs.businessContext: The depth of the joint to be filled.

inputs.label: Number of Joints
inputs.businessContext: Total number of joints of the same dimensions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of joints of the same dimensions.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Fugen mit denselben Abmessungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de joints de mêmes dimensions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de juntas de las mismas dimensiones.
businessContext_i18n.ar: العدد الإجمالي للمفاصل ذات الأبعاد نفسها.

inputs.label: Cartridge Volume
inputs.businessContext: Net volume of mastic in one standard cartridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Net volume of mastic in one standard cartridge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir standart kartuştaki net mastik hacmi.

businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen neto de masilla en un cartucho estándar.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional percentage to account for material loss during application.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional percentage to account for material loss during application.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Uygulama sırasında malzeme kaybını hesaba katmak için ek yüzde.

businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje adicional para tener en cuenta la pérdida de material durante la aplicación.
